methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Space & Aerospace (found 0 same-stage, 2 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 11 same-sector peers exist in Space & Aerospace, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Space & Aerospace P/S median is 25.8x across 6 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

data.narrative:
KP Labs is a Series A-stage space and aerospace company founded by Krzysztof Pacan. The valuation universe comprises 13 peers: 5 public companies (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and 8 private firms including SpaceX, Sierra Space, Planet Labs, Impulse Space, and Apex Space.

Two standard triangulation methods are not applicable here. Peer-median analysis fails due to insufficient narrow peer density: while 11 same-sector peers exist, zero operate at identical stage, only 2 sit at adjacent stage, and none cluster in similar valuation tiers—falling below the minimum 3-datapoint threshold. Public-comp anchoring cannot be deployed because KP Labs' revenue is not on file, and without this metric the 25.8x median P/S multiple across the 6 public Space & Aerospace comps cannot be applied. Private company revenue disclosure remains sparse.

No triangulated valuation range can be responsibly derived from the available data. The primary constraint is lack of target-company financials (revenue, EBITDA, or comparable transaction multiples). To support a quantitative valuation, KP Labs would need to either provide revenue guidance or be benchmarked against private peers with disclosed terms. The public-market median P/S of 25.8x establishes a sector reference point but cannot anchor a private Series A valuation without revenue input. Further due diligence on comparable fundings or internal financial disclosure is required before advancing to a specific range.
